purpose: Define the boundary between GitHub Issue submissions and archived Echo records.

archived_echo_requirements.detail: echoes/records/...json must exist in the repository
record_kind must be one of: echo_v3, verification_report_v2, echo_v3_with_verification_report, test_record, legacy_record
generated_by metadata must be present and valid for non-legacy records
echo_v3_with_verification_report must link to a valid verification_report_v2
api/echo-index.json must include the wrapper path

echo_submission.warning: Submissions not generated through Claim Gate / Report Builder may be labeled needs-format and are not archived Echo records.

verification_report.warning: Submissions not generated through Claim Gate / Report Builder may be labeled needs-format.

echo_type_derivation.V0_E2_exception: Only if explicitly marked non-technical orientation and reviewed

agent_gateway_submissions.note: Gateway-created issues are still Issue submissions only. They are not archived Echoes. They are not attestation. They require normal triage and validation.
agent_gateway_submissions.label: agent-gateway-intake
